observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with handling damage
Visual pattern suggesting crease or fold mark
Localized deviation from normal leather appearance
mechanism_explanation: Improper handling during transport or processing causes creases or deformation.
severity_visual_description: moderate crease or fold mark visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Train operators and add protective packaging between steps.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the crease or fold mark would be absent and surface appears normal.
